today.nutrition_subtitle: Protein, carbs, and fat vs today’s targets
today.no_alerts: No alerts right now. Keep logging.
today.widget_hint: Pin AURA Today for a glance without opening the app.
today.add_home_subtitle: iOS does not let apps place widgets for you. Follow these steps once — then Today stays on your Home Screen.
today.add_home_step_1: Touch and hold an empty area on the Home Screen, then tap Edit → Add Widget.
today.add_home_step_2: Search for AURA and choose “AURA Today”.
today.add_home_step_3: Tap Add Widget — numbers refresh from this app automatically.
today.widget_tip_line: One glance, then move — log the next meal in under 20 seconds.
today.home_guide_body: This is your home screen for the day. Glance the ring, act with one tap, then keep living — deep menus stay optional.
today.home_guide_ring_body: Remaining kcal and the calorie goal sit in the hero card. If the ring is calm, you are on track.
today.home_guide_actions_body: Food, water, coach pulse, and burn open sheets without leaving Today. Log in under 20 seconds.
today.home_guide_metrics_body: Eaten / burned / water tiles and nutrition bars show balance. Alerts call out one thing to fix next.
today.home_guide_surfaces_body: Pin the Home Screen widget or start a Live Activity so “how much left?” never needs a full app open.

log.title: Log
log.subtitle_today: Log meals and burns for today.
log.subtitle_past: Review and adjust this day’s entries.
log.empty: Nothing yet. Tap a meal or burn to start.

coach.title: Coach
coach.daily_assist_body: On-device tips and local reminders. No account, no cloud coach.
coach.journal_hint: One honest line beats a perfect diary.

onboarding.welcome_body: AURA keeps calories, water, and coaching on this device.
onboarding.body_body: Height, weight, and activity set your daily energy target.
onboarding.ready_body: Your local profile is ready. Permissions come next.

permissions.intro_body: Local reminders and motion help AURA pace your day. You can skip any step.
permissions.notifications_body: Meal, water, and movement nudges stay on this phone.
permissions.location_body: Optional context for outdoor sessions — not background tracking.
permissions.fitness_body: Improves burn estimates from activity on this device.

sheets.log_food_subtitle: Stay on Today — pick a meal, then a preset.
sheets.add_water_subtitle: One tap keeps the hydration ring honest.

tips.today_body: Check remaining kcal and the ring first. If warnings are empty, skip deep menus and log the next meal in under 20 seconds.
tips.log_body: Tap a quick-add before you hunt labels. Honest estimates beat empty days — you can refine custom entries later.
tips.body_title: Set the body once a week
tips.body_body: Height, weight, and activity drive BMR/TDEE. Update weight weekly; daily noise makes goals jittery.
tips.coach_body: On a real iPhone, open Health or Food coach. Give today’s summary and ask for one meal or one walk — not a full diet overhaul.
tips.widget_body: Add the AURA Today widget and start a Live Activity before lunch. The island should answer “how much left?” without opening the app.
tips.water_body: Log +250 ml when you sit down to work or finish a set. Water goals unlock cleaner coach warnings by late afternoon.

empty.generic_body: When you add data, it will show up in this space.
